chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-481 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 18.11.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel. = None present for the petitioner, same was the position on the last date of hearing, when the learned State Counsel filed his parawise comments, wherein the police officials have denied the allegations for causing any harassment to the petitioners. It has been further stated in the parawise comments that FIR No.296/2014 was lodged and the case has also been challaned which is pending adjudication before the concerned trial Court, whereas the FIR No.190/2015 lodged by respondent No.10-Allah Dino against the petitioners No.1 & 2, was investigated and subsequently disposed of in “B” Class. It has been further undertaken in the parawise comments that police officials are not patronizing the private respondents and have undertaken to provide protection to the petitioners, if they are approached with such a request. This petition is disposed of with the directions that respondents particularly police officials will ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners and will provide protection to the petitioner if they are approached but strictly in accordance with law. The private respondents are restrained from extending threats and causing any harassment to the petitioners. With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of. Copy of this order be supplied to the learned State Counsel for his necessary action and strict compliance.

With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of. Copy of this order be supplied to the learned State Counsel for his necessary action and strict compliance. JUDGE Shahid
